final:
module shift_register (  
    input clk,  
    input enable,  
    input serial_in,  
    output reg [1:0] parallel_out  
);  
    always @(posedge clk) begin  
        if (enable) begin  
            parallel_out <= {serial_in, parallel_out[1]};  
        end  
    end  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      parallel_out <= {parallel_out[1], serial_in};
    end
  end

endmodule
